metadata.description: Azure region used for workspace, Application Insights, alerts, and workbook resources.
Log Analytics workspace name.
Retention for the shared Log Analytics workspace in days.
Production Application Insights component name.
Dedicated E2E Application Insights component name.
Whether to deploy a workbook in the shared workspace.
Workbook display name.
Whether to create a dedicated action group from this template.
Action group resource name.
Action group short name. Maximum 12 characters.
Optional email receivers for the dedicated action group.
Optional webhook receivers for the dedicated action group.
Existing action group resource id used by scheduled query alerts when deployActionGroup is false.
Whether to deploy scheduled query alerts.
Common tags applied to all Azure Monitor resources created by this template.

variables.telemetryNoDataQuery:
[format('AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where _ResourceId =~ "{0}"
| where Name startswith "electivus.apex-log-viewer/"
| summarize events = count()
| where events == 0', toLower(variables('prodComponentResourceId')))]
variables.cliDiscoveryQuery:
[format('AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where _ResourceId =~ "{0}"
| where Name in ("electivus.apex-log-viewer/cli.exec", "electivus.apex-log-viewer/cli.getOrgAuth")
| extend props = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(props["code"]) in ("ENOENT", "CLI_NOT_FOUND")
| summarize failures = count()
| where failures >= 3', toLower(variables('prodComponentResourceId')))]
variables.cliTimeoutQuery:
[format('AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where _ResourceId =~ "{0}"
| where Name in ("electivus.apex-log-viewer/cli.exec", "electivus.apex-log-viewer/cli.getOrgAuth")
| extend props = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(props["code"]) == "ETIMEDOUT"
| summarize failures = count()
| where failures >= 5', toLower(variables('prodComponentResourceId')))]
variables.refreshFailureQuery:
[format('AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where _ResourceId =~ "{0}"
| where Name == "electivus.apex-log-viewer/logs.refresh"
| extend props = parse_json(Properties)
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(tostring(props["outcome"]) == "error")
| extend errorRate = iff(total == 0, 0.0, 100.0 * todouble(errors) / todouble(total))
| where total >= 20 and errorRate >= 15', toLower(variables('prodComponentResourceId')))]
variables.debugLevelsQuery:
[format('AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
| where _ResourceId =~ "{0}"
| where Name == "electivus.apex-log-viewer/debugLevels.load"
| extend props = parse_json(Properties), measurements = parse_json(Measurements)
| extend outcome = tostring(props["outcome"]), durationMs = todouble(measurements["durationMs"])
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(outcome == "error"), p95 = percentile(durationMs, 95)
| extend errorRate = iff(total == 0, 0.0, 100.0 * todouble(errors) / todouble(total))
| where total >= 5 and (errorRate >= 50 or p95 >= 60000)', toLower(variables('prodComponentResourceId')))]

Window size used by the rule, for example PT1H.

Whether the rule is enabled.
Additional tags applied to the rule.
